subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! Although means were not provided so that thou mayest present thyself at the general Convention... Regarding the use of liquor
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب ملکوت الله هر چند بمجمع شورای عمومی اسباب حضور میسر نگشت ولی معذور
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @love of God, @universal language, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
